disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Patent airway — normal voice, full sentences, swallows water, no stridor, no lip/tongue swelling
trigger_question_examples: Can you speak in full sentences and swallow a sip of water?
Is your breathing noisy/whistling, or your lips/tongue swelling?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can speak and swallow water fine, my breathing isn't noisy, and no swelling.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lesions are bilateral, symmetric, painless white lacy streaks that do not rub/scrape off; no ulcer/induration
trigger_question_examples: Are the white lines on both cheeks and lacy/web-like, and are they painless?
Do they wipe off, and is there any ulcer or lump?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: They're on both cheeks, lacy and painless, they don't wipe off, and I can't see an ulcer or lump.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Symptoms began on suddenly noticing the lesions and googling; hyperventilating with palpitations
trigger_question_examples: When did the panic start relative to noticing the lines and reading about cancer?
Does this feel like anxiety/panic you've had before?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started the moment I saw them and read about cancer; it feels like my previous panic.

patient_initiated_exchanges.patient_text: Is this mouth cancer? Is my throat closing?
patient_initiated_exchanges.expected_ai_doctor_response_quality: Reassure using the demonstrable airway signs (voice, swallowing, no stridor) that the throat is not closing; explain bilateral painless lacy streaks are benign a benign mouth-lining autoimmune condition, not cancer; coach breathing and stop the compulsive checking; arrange routine dental/GP confirmation with an airway safety-net.
